INVOKE.COMMENT: union tasks and extTasks. The difference is not relevant for monitoring purposes

LOOP.COMMENT: Map all tasks to the less opaque scheduler doctype

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: Monitoring on failure status of IS schedulers. 0 = last run successfull; 1 = last run failed

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: Monitoring on status of IS schedulers. 0 = suspended, 1 = active, 2 = running, 10 = unknown

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: Monitoring on next execution time of IS schedulers. Time to next run in seconds.

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics
